DRD.name: Delta Residual Decisorio
DRD.formula: weighted_sum(delta_estado, delta_gate, delta_evidencia, delta_trajetoria, delta_token, delta_claim_boundary)
DRD.current_t0_policy: delta_trajetoria excluded and weights renormalized until trajectory exists

DZR.name: Delta Zero Readiness
DZR.delta_zero_ready_rule: DRD <= 0.10 and DZR >= 0.90 and computed_gate in READY/OBSERVATION and no hard blocks
